name: idea-to-product
description: Multi-runtime AI PM plugin with workflow orchestration, hook review gates, reviewer agents, and supporting skills.

interface.shortDescription: Turn ideas into developer-ready product requirements.
interface.longDescription: Idea to Product helps non-developers shape ideas into PRD, AC, policy, measurement, decision logs, and structural HTML wireframes through PM workflows, commands, hook gates, and reviewer agents.
defaultPrompt: Use Idea to Product to turn this idea into screen-based questions, policy decisions, measurement design, AC, and PRD output.
